reviews.review_text: Great spot and great facilities
Nice place to stay and cheap
Nice place great for kids studio cabin was small but nice and clean

Je suis resté 1 semaine dans ce camping pendant le mois d'octobre 2025. J'étais dans un emplacement pour voiture avec roof tente. C'était vraiment bien mise à part le faite que j'était loin de toute les installations. Les cuisines, les sanitaires et la piscine étaient bien tenue. La piscine est excellente.

Lovely spot in Airlie Beach.Rooms were clean and suitable for what we needed,however internet was non existent after trying on multiple occasions both on.devices and smart tvs in the room and hot water in room was  lukewarm for our 2 day stay.My daughter had the same issue with I internet on her powered camp site
Did not mention this on checkout as ladies at front counter did not really ask how stay was. If these issues were fixed I would give a 5 star rating.

We camped on powered sites for 5 days over Easter.  Well maintained large showers kept very clean.
Fairly close to town.
Perfect place to stay with kids. Clean cabins, lots of activities around the park.

Călătorim în Australia de peste 20 de zile și am schimbat hotelul aproape în fiecare seară, cu excepția câtorva situații. Am stat atât în locații mai bune, cât și în locații mai puțin bune, dar experiența de la Discovery a fost, de departe, cea mai plăcută pentru mine.
În primul rând, nu am mai stat niciodată într-un camping ca adult, iar experiența de a fi în mijlocul naturii, înconjurată de pădure, a fost cu adevărat specială. Să te trezești dimineața în sunetul păsărilor este pur și simplu incredibil și îți dă o stare de liniște pe care nu o găsești în hotelurile clasice.
Totul este foarte bine organizat, curat și gândit astfel încât să te simți confortabil, chiar dacă ești într-un mediu natural. Este genul de loc în care chiar reușești să te deconectezi și să te bucuri de experiență.
Pentru mine a fost una dintre cele mai frumoase surprize ale acestei călătorii și cu siguranță aș reveni.

Este adevărat că am stat într-o cabană de tip family, mai spațioasă decât cele în care au fost cazați alți colegi din grup, ale căror unități erau destul de mici — abia încăpea valiza. Noi am stat mai în spate, la cabana numărul 23 (există chiar și unele mai mari, cum sunt cele din zona 26), iar experiența a fost cu adevărat specială.
Să te trezești dimineața în sunetul atâtor păsărele, în mijlocul naturii, este incredibil. Nu mi-am imaginat că poate fi atât de plăcut să dormi practic în pădure și totuși să ai confortul unei cazări bine organizate.
Această experiență m-a făcut să descopăr o latură nouă a mea și cred sincer că fiecare familie ar trebui să își aducă copiii să trăiască astfel de momente, pentru a se reconecta cu natura.

Locația este foarte curată, bine întreținută, are piscină și diverse activități. Din partea mea, merită fără dubiu 5 stele.
Nice quiet place

Wir haben auf dem Campingplatz Discovery Airlie Beach 3 Nächte per Wohnmobil übernachtet und waren wirklich begeistert. Die gesamte Anlage ist sehr schön angelegt, weitläufig und gleichzeitig äußerst gepflegt und sauber. Man merkt sofort, dass hier viel Wert auf Ordnung und eine angenehme Atmosphäre gelegt wird.

Besonders positiv aufgefallen ist uns die hervorragend ausgestattete Küche. Alles war vorhanden und sehr sauber, sodass man problemlos selbst kochen konnte. Auch die Anbindung an den öffentlichen Nahverkehr ist sehr gut, was es einfach macht, die Umgebung zu erkunden.

Ein echtes Highlight für uns war, dass wir sogar ein kostenloses Upgrade bekommen haben.

Insgesamt hatten wir einen richtig angenehmen Aufenthalt und können den Campingplatz absolut weiterempfehlen.

We were so looking forward to staying here however,  sincerely disappointed in service and not being informed of information.  We had extremely poor internet and phone service,  couldn't receive deals on the internet, so we drove all the way there to find office closes at 4pm. We arrived at 4.04 and they were closed.  Extremely bad service! If yo advertise deals, them your potential customers should have axcess to that service over the phone not only internet. Furthermore,  the receptionist should have been able to give us the advertised deal and should have explained they close at 4pm. My issue wasn't in regards to telstra reception its your service.  I will not recommend your  tourist park however,  I  have always had great service from other discovery parks.😡😡😡

We stayed in a superior 2 room cabin for 2 nights. We had an amazing time.
Outdoor bbq, washer and dryer, lovely stocked kitchen. Comfy beds and the kids had Thier own room with 2 bunks, AC and TV
Our room had a big double bed, AC and TV
Bathroom was fantastic.
Our deck had a bbq so it was lovely to cook and overlook the park and be visited by local cockatoos 😂 🐦
The playground was great but the kids were drawn to the waterpark. Very popular spot and close to everything in Airlie beach.

Due to cyclone koji we couldn’t make it down from cairns in time, so I asked for the possibility of a refund. They dodged the question by postponing my 2 day stay by one day. While I appreciate the gesture I noted that due to continuous road flooding this wouldn’t solve my problem. So again I asked for the possibility of a refund to which they never bothered to reply. I respect cancellation policies but don’t appreciate the lack of communication and prioritising financial gain over customer safety. However they were not shy to inform about pools closure due to cyclone Koji damage…

Update: After their reply under my post I reached out via E-Mail and have never gotten any reply again. If you can you should avoid this place.

We recently stayed when the Cyclone hit Airlie Beach. The assistance, communication and service was extraordinary. We had a boat that was stored safely, we were moved to another cabin for safety reasons with no cost to us and they kindly accommodated our little dog.
The text messages and verbal communication from management was not only appreciated but of comfort to us. Thank you, we recommend highly and will be back for sure!!!

My boys and I just returned after spending 5 days here and we absolutely loved it. Unfortunately for us we arrived just as the cyclone hit, we were going to leave when it was safe to do so and unlike the other commenter we were offered a refund for the remaining days but we decided to stay and we were pleasantly surprised how quickly management got to work cleaning up and ensuring things went back to normal asap. The facilities for the kids were fantastic but the splash park was the real winner!! We will definitely be back 🙂

Nice place to stay.
You have bus, which cost only 50 cents to go any where. So it's comfortable.
Rooms, are okay.
*The only problem is that there are cockroaches. When I opened one of the drawers, there was a large, live cockroach inside.*
Otherwise, there are no problems.

Room was very clean, all the comfort things included, hair dryer, tissues etc.
Customer service was friendly and very informative.  Sent messages through weather warnings, during TC Koji.
Bed was comfortable with a variety of pillow sizes to suit anyone's comfort level.
Highly recommend. The little distance from Airlie was not an issue. Great water park, pool area for families.
Great place to stay. We will stay again.

Great camping experience at Discovery Parks! Clean facilities, well-maintained grounds, and a relaxed, family-friendly atmosphere. Perfect spot to unwind and enjoy the outdoors — would happily stay again

Bathroom facilities were very clean, large shower space and bright lighting. Love the water park as well. We stayed there during the Christmas period and staff came over and sent us and the kids Christmas souvenirs. The kids enjoyed the gifts so much. Thank you!

This place was great for kids and the adults. Plenty of on site activities and the new splash pad is a winner. Our room was nice with everything you could need. It's position so close to town is very handy as well.

Great spot and we will be back!!!
Room really tiny with mould smell. Cannot easily open shower door. Far away from everything
Great park but children’s playground and baby pool is in full sun whole day, there is no shaded area for little kids to swim or play, except the jumping pillow. Staff is very friendly and helpful.

Beautiful park. Great amenities. Clean and tidy. Good location. Quiet. Friendly. Nice pool. Nice ensuites. They were doing some maintenance but they upgraded us to an ensuite site so we were very happy!
Very very clean and modern cabins. Super comfy beds and pillows. Extremely well managed property with excellent service and facilities. I will definitely retutn!

The room was very clean and tidy, it was a short bus in to the city and the bus stop was close. It has a pool and a waterpark. Unfortunately there is only WiFi in the gameroom so only a couple of rooms had access

We had a rude interaction with one of the office staff and the water supply was unreliable throughout our stay. For two days we were required to shower off-site, yet no compensation was offered for the disruption. Will not be recommending to family and friends.

Disappointing Stay at Discovery Caravan Park. We stayed on a non-powered site at the far end of the park, and it was not a great experience. The only toilets were located at the very beginning, which meant long walks back and forth, especially inconvenient with no water nearby. To make matters worse, there was a strong smell of urine as people seemed to use the bushes for relief. Definitely not what we expected, and we won't be returning.

The bed we had room 206 smelled like cat piss, coffee stains on bed sheets.
Lack of housekeeping.
And don't bother with the Wi-fi.
Avoid the small cabins on the left hand side👎🏼👎🏿
Room 218 There were many guests knocking on the door in the room, which affected my sleep at night. There must be a girl working in the room.
Convenient location. Modern and clean facilities. Lovely staff :)

We used Discovery Parks - Airlie Beach as the base for the boys for pre-wedding activities and grooms party accomodation and getting ready for our wedding. The team at Discovery Parks Airlie Beach were so accomodating! Fantastic service. The facilities were great and the park is a nice location, the grounds and park facilities were clean and enjoyable. The accommodation was clean and comfortable. The staff were very welcoming and were so helpful with enquiries before and during our stay. The boys all had a great stay and have said they would all use Discovery Parks Airlie Beach again next visit to Airlie Beach.
Nice place , good amenities, the only problem is the smell coming from the standing water next to the camp

We had a fabulous stay for Easter this year, we loved the park so much we booked for Easter 2026 while we were there!
Great facilities and we loved the cabins across the front close to the water park. Chris, Kristy and their team were so accomodating, we can’t wait to go back!

We had such a great stay! The park was clean, well-kept, and perfect for families. The staff were super friendly and made everything easy. Great facilities and a lovely atmosphere — we’ll definitely be back!
Great park and wonderful location. The park is clean, tidy and extremely well maintained. Staff are amazing and nothing is too much trouble. This is definitely the place to stay in Airlie!
Had a lovely stay, we stay I one of the cabins, very clean felt like we were in the rain forest, very quiet. Staff very accomodating, will recommend to family and friends.
Love this park, have stayed many times with my family. Awesome pool, kids games room, friendly staff. Has a great vibe, will definitely return.
Love this park, always a great stay with lots to do for the kids. Surrounds are beautiful, great location.

Our family had a fantastic stay at this park! The staff were helpful and welcoming.
The accomodation was spotless and well equiped, making it easy to relax.
Very family friendly and great facilities for the kids. Highly recommend for a comfortable and enjoyable getaway.
Wonderful place to stay. Gorgeous and clean rooms with wonderful activities all around the site.

We absolutely loved our stay! The cabin was modern, clean and had everything we needed. The park was very well maintained with great facilities. The staff were all so friendly and helpful. Highly recommend!

We had the best time staying here, easy to book, room was clean and tidy, the park itself was fun and entertaining, as well as being close enough to what Airlie has to offer. The best thing though was being far enough away from the noise, lights and energy to rest and relax.

If you’re after a mix of nature, comfort, and convenience, this place delivers. Check-in is smooth; staff are helpful, especially with kids’ needs and tour advice. It’s nice when you feel supported as a guest.

Our family stayed at this park in September for our child's footy carnival. The cabin was clean and tidy. The staff were exceptional, very welcoming and friendly. The park amenities were great! Will definitely come back and would recommend this park to other families.
Great location, awesome amenities and excellent for families. Will definitely be back.
Friendly staff, clean rooms and wonderful amenities. A great place for a family holiday.
Loved my stay at the park, staff were so friendly. The unit we stayed in was very nice. Will look forward to our next visit

Amazing park with fantastic management! We have a young family, and this place is absolutely perfect for families. The staff and management are brilliant. They always have lots of fun events and activities planned for the kids. We recently stayed over Easter, and there were so many great things for our little ones to enjoy. The facilities are spotless, well-maintained, and the park itself is just beautiful. Huge shoutout to Chris, Kristy and their wonderful team. 10/10 would highly recommend!

Have stayed multiple times. In rooms. In sites. It’s an amazing little park! Safe. Neat. Tidy and everything you need! The staff are so friendly and helpful. They always go the extra mile for the kids!
Such a wonderful park. The facilities, pool and kids playground are outstanding. Plus the managers are super friendly and helpful. Totally recommend staying here.

A fabulous holiday destination for all. Location plus / accommodation superb. Family environment for all ages. Fun activities on your doorstep. Location to beach only minutes away / walking distance when that wake coffee is calling xx  💕🌞👍
What an amazing place to stay and have a holiday. All facilities are top class as well as STAFF. Highly recommended.

My family and I had the best time. Staff were really friendly and helpful. The emenitys and grounds were very tidy. Recommended this caravan park to all family's needing a fun relaxing break and look forward to returning.
Amazing stay. Staff r brilliant. Rooms clean and  grounds near n tidy
Fantastic place and great staff.
Fantastic park! Staff are lovely and incredibly friendly. Well maintained amenities and kitchens. Clean and tidy grounds. Will stay again
Amazing place.
Amazing place, will definitely stay again
Au top !

Great place to park the van while visiting Airlie Beach. Chris, Kristy & Christine are very pleasant and do what they can to accommodate your needs. Thoroughly recommend them if your travelling that way

Wir waren mit dem Camper da, somit keine Bewertung der Zimmer. Echt toller Platz ein wenig Abseits von Airlie Beach, aber den Bus vor der Tür und für einen Doller in die Stad gefahren. Wir hatten Toilette und Dusche sm Platz gebucht, alles Top. BBQ Area absolut sauber, Eisfach und Kühlschrank Nutzun frei.
Always love staying here while in Airlie. Love the lorikeet feeding at 8am everyday !!! So great for kids. Cant wait for the new waterpark

-Good location
-Great customer service by staff members
-Standard cabin got plenty of room for 2
-Got bus stop in front of park, so convenient while travelling to shops or for adventure pickups.
- Reasonable prices
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Friendly staff.  Great location. Appreciated the free upgrade.  Cabin was comfortable and well set up.
In our van site good

Easy and simple check in. Great site and easy hookups.
2.6km walk to centre. Easy and fun walk.
Quiet location.  We had a powered ensuite caravan site.  The ensuite was excellent with a separate toilet and shower room.  Well situated for access I to Airlie Beach village centre.
Caravan park

Stayed at many caravan parks over the years, Discovery Park Airlie Beach has to be up there with the best parks we've stayed. So well layed out... not simetrical rows of parks. It has a  lovely welcoming vibe and very clean and tidy.
Great customer service

Lovely Park.
The cabin was perfect for the two of us.
The staff couldn't have done more to make us comfortable
Very helpful staff

92 caravan sites and only one ablution block. Had to walk 200 metres for toilet, shower and washing machine. And, only three working washing machines!
Camp kitchen was a fair distance away from unpowered sites as well
Not a very enjoyable stay.

Just stayed 3 nights on apowered grass site. Family of 4, with preschoolers. School holidays, so pretty busy.
Place is pretty tidy -camp kitchen, pool, playground, amenities. The odd bit of maintenance is due - e.g. only half stove top elements worked. I liked there was an insect repellent available in camp kitchen.
There is a sign saying new water park coming soon, which will be great. Current one is functional but very tired. Another improvement in my mind would be to reinstate the toilets right at back of park by playground (it's a bit of a distance to main amenities from there).
Overall a nice park, would happily return.

Absolutely gorgeous little plot! Unfortunately, my son experienced a medical episode as soon as we arrived and they broke their backs helping myself and my son. Truly an amazing little gem of a place, with even better staff. We’re so thankful for the help and care we received!
Thankyou for a great 6 day stay. Staff fantastic, thanks to Ian for helping us fit a new table. Amenities tops, pool and BBQ tops. Bird feeding a great extra.
Very good amenities. Clean and quiet. The bathroom get too wet after shower.
Great location, plenty of room, good ammenties, friendly staff
Can't beat perfection plus 👌 🥰

Friendly staff, thank you for making our request being close to the Amenities possible. Good, clean Amenities, hot water. Pool was lovely and clean.  It was nice that the Park provided Citronella product for Midge, even with the product and our own Anti Insect spray my partner was covered all over with bites after 4 nights. I am aware this is not the parks fault, this is natur. Apart from the bites on a daily basis, we thought the park was very well maintained.

We had a great experience here at Discovery Park. Rooms were clean, staff was friendly. We thoroughly enjoyed the bird feeding every morning. Mr. Ian was fun to talk to and learn about the area from. He’s the type of Aussie that will make you love Australia.

- Jonah and Alexis from the USA
Stayed recently, great location, amenities first rate, and our cabin perfect.
Lovely location. Beautiful pool area. Nice clean amenities. Very quiet. Handy camp kitchen. Only problem were the ants all over our caravan.

Extremely disappointed in this park.
Multiple issues with ensuite site.

Site:
Has overgrown hedges taking space away from already tight site.
Crusher dust for your caravan to sit on which moves and sinks with rain.
Trip hazards when walking to ensuite with power box sticking out of ground and water pipe  sticking out.
Concrete outside ensuite full of crusher dust and dirt to point can't tell there's concrete there.
No where for power cord to be kept of ground out of weather.

Ensuite:
Door to shower didn't close. Had to contact office to have someone come out and temporarily repair to be able to close door and be secure.
Toilet door handle sticks and Extremely hard to open. Had to have them come out again to fix issue.
Exhaust fan in bathroom does not work even though ensuites freshly renovated.

Die Anlage selbst ist sehr sauber und das Personal überaus freundlich, jedoch hatte ich ein Problem mit Bettwanzen. Jede unbedeckte Stelle, mit der man auf der Matratze lag,war über und über mit Bissen übersäht. Die Stockbetten waren Bettwanzenfrei.

1st night and I feel like leaving a review. Check in was 1st class. Hubby loves a chat and girl at reception was patient and caring. Well done. The room is super clean amazing job to the housekeepers. The park well maintained with 3 camp kitchens. Well worth staying here. Management went above and beyond . Great job all around. Highly recommended.
Awesome park with great staff

A little out of the main town, not an issue as most places in town offer curtesy buses! And taxis are available!
But very peaceful and quiet, comfy nice size rooms and very clean.
We enjoyed the pool facilities and water park too!
BBQ area was a good touch and laundry easily accessible
Gratis UP-Grade Mit eigenem Badezimmer. Toller Pool und gepflegte Anlage.
Super schöne Anlage

We stayed in a lovely cabin! Very clean and comfy bed!! Shower leaked a bit but dried up quickly. Bus stop was just outside the park which was easy to get to town and back (at night it’s the last stop back from town). Pool was nice and big too!

Spent 3 weeks here as I was working in the area. From the time I arrived to leaving the staff were wonderful and helpful and if there was any problem like the council turning the water off, the staff at the park were very helpful in communicating with everyone in the park by a text message which was awesome.
The park was located in a nice area with bus stops just outside of the park and only a little drive to anything you wanted.
Reasonable accommodation, had everything you need.  Bus stop out the front.  Park is well maintained, cleaners were very helpful.
Love Love Love Discovery Park Airlie Beach 🌺
Lots of ants throughout, unclean and just overall not a good experience
Amazing place to stay! Staff were all super friendly. Very convenient bus stop right outside to get in and out of Airlie Beach for only $1 for a day pass.10/10
Clean, pleasant surprise!  Everything we needed!

Great place to stay. Amanda went above and beyond for our booking and was super helpful and friendly on check in along with the other lady on reception. Chris the park manager went out of his way to help us up to the cabins.
Would highly recommend staying for their friendly service and clean cabins.

Quiet little park during the week, sites aren’t real level and it’s a hike and a half to the toilets if you’re in the back row like we were. The pool is fantastic but the splash park probably should be shut it’s that old and rickety.
Didn’t love that they ‘shut’ the pool for tree maintenance with no notice for 2 days
Bit of communication on arrival would’ve been handy if you’re not sending texts out

No toilets up by the playground and bouncy pillow is asking for kids to have accidents.

If you’re staying here be prepared for the Midges!! They’re really really bad!
Like leave early bad.
You couldn’t sit outside at any point day or night without being attacked

You can see these guys are trying to fix it up with the pool and toilets being exceptional so at least they’re trying
Not sure how you fix the bug problem though

The facilities you get for what you pay is super worth it! We loved the pool and showers!
All clean and well maintained.
We truly enjoyed our stay here with our Caravan, (Powered) on site. Its was peaceful and close by to the beaches etc :)
We enjoyed the stay, thank you

Stayed here for 2 nights in our camper van so I cannot rate the cabins. Toilets, showers,kitchen, general area: all very clean!! Great facilities available: oven ,washing machines, iron. Was quiet and felt safe. Great location.  Less than 10 minutes on the bus to Airlie town. Would definitely stay here again.
Very nice campground with clean facilities.

Perfect stay. All the ambience like showers, toilets etc are brand new renovated. Overall does the park make a very inviting appearance. The service was easy, friendly and on point and with the optimal location between all important places, perfect for visiting the Whitsundays 🤩 we'll come back.
As additional details regarding the price and booking, I would like to mention that it was the only park which allowed us to book literally the same day and for two days only. That even came with a 20% discount and we paid only 33 bucks per night. 🤑

We were stayed there for 5 nights, the room perfectly clean and well presented. But unfortunately there are construction work so a little bit noise on the weekdays. That would be great too if the management able to increase wifi speed. 😉
Dissatisfied with the facilities. Run down. The midgies here are outta control. If you stay here be prepared to go insane from scratching. No joke. They need to do something about it. Boring for kids

Das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis ist sehr schlecht. Wir haben für das
kleinste im Angebot vorhandene Camping-Haus über 200 AUD bezahlt, das Personal ist sehr unfreundlich und das Wifi hat in underem Zimmer leider nicht fuktioniert, auch bei der Rezeption war die Geschwindigkeit sehr langsam.
Hade a powered site for 3 days friendly staff and tropical atmosphere in the park with pool and kids water park at the front
Nice park, quiet but relatively handy location. Bus at front gate. Great amenities, including pool & water park for the kids.

Loved this place.  Especially loved the birds on the veranda.  Was picked up twice at the bus stop put the front to go on trips
Tropical garden.  Water monitor outside.

We have not long left this lovely park.
It was so easy to lazy away the time here.
There are birds you  can watch or feed. Things for kids
To play on and swim in.
The amenities are spotless. Great time.

Room was smaller than anticipated,
Didnt have a view as such, looked at parked trucks.

Ensuite site was clean and modern. Shame it was a bit hard to walk into the ensuite due to the slope and obstacles in the way. Staff very helpful. Bird feeding an added bonus. The pool looked lovely and was 25 degrees. Staff were very helpful.

Great park.  Good location.  Great sites.  However the Ensuite let our site down.  It was clean but the door did not shut well. The one next door was even worse.  The door was slammed every time it was used.  We complained and they tried to fix it but it was no better.  We complained again but no action the second time.  Disappointing.
Great park, especially for families,  we only stayed 3 nights in cabin could of stayed a week. Well worth it. Cabin had everything we needed and was so comfortable.
Please give Ian the maintenance man an 11 out of ten for customer service, going above and beyond the call of duty to help me hitch up my van.  Thx Sue 🤩🤩⭐️⭐️⭐️🤩🤩
The cabin was spacious, clean and comfortable. It was suitable for our needs.

Beautiful park with beautiful surroundings. Birds of all types wandering around. Safe and vet friendly.
Cons, for some reason there was no tv reception. Very dog friendly. Don’t take site 47 because it is one of the very few that had no slab so was very dusty with lots of tree roots. Would definitely stay here again.
good good good good good

I am currently staying at the Airlie Beach Discovery Park, and I can't recommend it highly enough for your next getaway. The rooms are not only spacious and immaculate but also thoughtfully designed to provide maximum comfort. What truly sets this place apart is the exceptional staff, who consistently go above and beyond to ensure your stay is both memorable and enjoyable. Their warm hospitality and attention to detail make every guest feel valued and well cared for. Whether you're looking for relaxation or adventure, Airlie Beach Discovery Park is the perfect destination for an unforgettable vacation.

We stayed here for the weekend in cabin 17.
Whilst it was a good stay and cabins were nice and clean and kids playground was awesome entertainment for my little one.
Start to evening, night and early morning it was quite cold and as rooms have no heaters it was extremely cold in the cabins!
As well as our tv was very glitchy and was not able to watch what we wanted without it playing up.
Other then that our stay was awesome,
Thank you !!
Stayed here 1 night in the studio rooms. Had everything you need and priced well. Only downside was we were at the end with the stairs and was noisy with people walking in at all hours.

Had a great stay here a few weeks back! The owner is great and he gave us an upgrade to a family room as we were traveling with our toddler and newborn. The rooms was modern, spacious, and really comfortable. They've said they're doing a massive water park upgrade in December, so we can't wait to come back! The jumping pillow was a hit as well as the front pools. Thanks for having us!

We paid for an unpowered site and were upgrade to an ensuite site. The ensuite was spotless and it was so lovely to have our own toilet and shower! It truly made the experience even better and I felt really safe and comfortable here. Reception was super friendly. We will definitely be back!

Cazarea din Airlie Beach a fost potrivită pentru noi: o cameră curată, o baie doar a noastră și un mini frigider în cameră. De asemenea, parcarea din complex a fost un lucru important pentru noi. Deși în camera se auzea ploaia de afară deoarece deasupra era direct acoperișul, m-am bucurat să aud sunetul ploilor de vară. Personalul a fost foarte amabil și ne-a ajutat cu posibilitatea de a face check-in-ul după ora recepției și a fost promți în a ne răspunde la orice solicitare. Un loc potrivit și pentru cei care călătoresc cu rulota și au nevoie de un spațiu de campare.
No microwave at the time I stayed that's why I moved on was a must

Wonderful park, lots of options for kids, on the first day we had the water park, jumping pillow and playground all to ourselves! Our son was over the moon! Toilets and showers were close by and clean! The Goanna Drive lived up to its name and we saw a huge monitor lizard! The only small drawback were the rubbish bins, which were quite close to the sites, so you had to be very careful not to be annoyed by yellow ants ;) There are lots of rainbow parrots and cockatoos in the park. The feeding in the morning was an absolute highlight before we left! What a great experience! Thank you for a wonderful time!
The studio was perfect for us to escape the rain . The camp kitchen was very clean and had everything you needed . The laundry was clean .
Not far from the centre of town, decent value, nice staff. Dog friendly. Has a pool , kids water park, and a bouncy bubble. Clean facility's, nice sites.

Buen lugar, limpio, cómodo, tranquilo y con todo lo necesario para disfrutar la estadía.
El espacio cuenta con piscina, juegos de agua para los niños y todas las mañanas puedes dar de comer a los pájaros. Volvería feliz!
Estás a 10 o 15 min en transporte hasta Airlie Beach y Shute Harbour donde están las principales actividades.
Lo malo… el shampoo, acondicionador y el internet muy malos.

Run down, borderline safe facilities. Sites and grounds are well kept but the waterpark, playground and pool area is awful! So run down, all falling apart and visible rough rusty parts on all facilities. Super disappointing for the price you pay per night for this park.

Easy to access, well signed. Whilst the cabins might be dated they are clean,  comfortable and have everything you need including full size fridge, oven and stove top. Cockatoos love to hang out on the verandahs. The camp kitchens and other facilities are well maintained, clean and well spaced

Always a family fave when we stay here!! Every time we've stayed over the years, the staff go over and beyond to cater to our family's wishes. It makes our stay more comfortable and relaxing for everyone involved.
The tropical gardens and grassed areas are always kept clean and inviting.

Surprinzător de calitativ și cu prețul cel mai mic. Exista diferite facilități: parcare pentru fiecare camera, spălătorie, zona de luat masa afara și un loc foarte verde și curat. Camerele chiar daca sunt micute sunt curate dotate cu aer condiționat. Pentru noi a existat posibilitatea unui late  check in iar asta ne-a ajutat foarte mult având în vedere că distanțele in Australia sunt foarte mari. De aici exista posibilitatea de a se contracta și experiențe la Marea Bariera de Corali iar autobuzul va ajunge chiar până aici pentru preluarea turiștilor. Pentru noi a fost o experiență frumoasă.

We recently stayed in one of the cabins which was perfect for our family of 5.The only minor comment is that the wifi didn’t work where our bungalow was situated and not having a smart tv which didn’t bother us.

Great service and very friendly staff who were very accommodating throughout our stay.

The kids had a ball with the many activities, water park and jumping pillow. We will definitely be back!
Very clean and nice spot only a 7 minute ride away from the center of Airlie beach. Pool was nice, and the they had plenty of kitchen/food areas.

The cabin, despite being very nice looking, was a bit small. The bathroom however was what really stood out, one of the best I have had throughout my trip so far.||However, there seemed to be a lot of insects, noticeably ants that managed to get into out food, but apart from that, nothing really to say.||Would still probably recommend.

Edit after their reply: please simply warn the user of your website. We personally got there at 7pm when there was only security who said that he couldn’t make the booking (which makes sense). Just a small update to the website and the camping is perfect!

Service:
Sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend
4/5*

Zimmer/Preis:
Das Zimmer war ok, aber zu dem absurden Preis war viel viel zu wenig geboten.
Habe 15 Minuten weiter 4 Nächte für die Hälfte des Preises gebucht und dort war das Zimmer vergleichsweise sehr luxuriös.
Auch die gesamte Parkanlage war dort wesentlich schöner und gepflegter.
2/5*

Fazit:
Leider keine Empfehlung von meiner Seite, da die anderen Unterkünfte in der direkten Umgebung wesentlich mehr bieten und dabei sogar wesentlich günstiger sind.
2/5*
Très bien équipé et grand

Up here for work, small but very clean rooms.
Highly recommended but if you don't have transport it is a distance to the hub of Airlie Beach.
Only issue is no microwave in the room
Great getaway. Perfect for families.
Best Value for Money 💰

We loved our stay at the park, welcoming owners, clean facilities, wonderful camp kitchen, friendly guests, cost effective.  The yard is massive and well maintained, and you could want to keep the kids entertained! We loved our stay and we will definitely be back if you this way again.

Wir hatten eine ziemlich teure Reise nach Australien gebucht.

Den Ort kann man nicht als luxuriös sondern eher als abenteuerlich beschreiben.

Wir hatten eine Deluxe Bali Villa gebucht. Hier ist absolut nix deluxe. Die Hütte ist dunkel, die Kinder müssen auf Stockbetten aus Metall schlafen und es ist alle mit kalten Leuchstofflampen beleuchtet.

Es gibt keinen Geschirrspüler, in der Villa ist keine Waschmaschine und es gibt keine Badewanne. Die vorhandene Dusche hat keinen abnehmbaren Kopf sondern nur einen fixen Duschkopf der ganz oben montiert ist. Für Kinder die absolute Katastrophe.

Der Wasserpark ist direkt an der Straße.

Das Personal ist ab 16:00 auf Feierabend und auch nicht erreichbar, wenn die Klimaanlage kaputt ist.

Die Discoveryparks sehen uns nicht mehr.

Eine herbe Enttäuschung!

Love it, will consider staying again.. the location and amenities are amazing.

One can spend days just in there.

Sophie + Sue + Amanda + Nathan and many more, team you are doing great job.

Thank you for making our trip memorable!
Tidy rooms and park grounds

Awesome place!
We had an en suite that was fantastic and clean as a whistle.
They allowed us to park up early and were super helpful.
Definitely recommend.
lovely and tidy
Sandflys just great
Sehr geehrter Platz Bus vor der Tür

Lovely setting and well laid out camp sites. Amenities a long way from the upper end of the campground, but all new and well looked after.
No evidence of any recycling at all, which is a first for a GDay park?

Really enjoyed our 2 night stay. Reception staff very helpful and were able to upgrade our site to powered at the last minute. Make sure you bring a long power lead as the roof tent pitch was a bit far from the power box. Great amenities and camp kitchen with fridge, tv, microwave, oven etc. Would definitely recommend and would stay again ☺️

Lovely, well set out.. in a powered site, lots of shade and birds..
Bus stops right outside for lift to boats and township
What a great place to stay pool was always clean great showers an camp kitchen 👌
My favourite park so far.

Great medium sized park. Good amenities for size of park.  Stayed at ensuite site.  Well worth extra money.  Nice and quiet up top of park.  Enjoyed feeding the cocktoos, they got used to me and came back every evening for a feed.  Booked early so got a good price.
Worth being a Gday member and being best mates
Large park with very helpful staff. Clean amenities and a good location. Very happy with the after hours help we got when we mistakenly set up in the wrong site.

Best place had a very relaxing time reception staff excellent many thanks for your help
Only thing they need more clothes lines desperately
Clean amenities
If I could give it a 10/10 I would 😁

Amenities very good and clean, surroundings neat and tidy. |Staff OK - do not answer phones especially on weekends |Quiet location out of centre of town |Difficult parking and some sloping sites .  |Quite expensive for what you get|Probably would not visit again

A nice park with really spacious sites. Enough to to park your car next to van spacious. Amenities are very clean with a resort style pool available. Seems to be plenty of cabins available also but we had our caravan. It is a bit out of the way from town and would be difficult if you didn't have a car however the bus stop is right outside and goes to town and tours pick you up most times anyway. A lovely park highly recommend.

Parco molto bello, ottimi giochi per bambini e anche piccolo parco acquatico.
Ci siamo trovati bene.

We stayed in a ensuite powered site with our caravan in August 2023 and it was the best stay we have had in our 3 week journey! New ensuite bathrooms, extremely clean. The whole park itself is very family friendly and obviously holds high standards for itself. I would 100% recommend staying here. I am not fussy with where we stay but this place is just beautiful and it’s nice to stop somewhere and be able to shower without shoes on. (For fear of things not actually being clean) amazing job to the people who run this place it’s great !
Great park, stayed in one of the new cabins, it was a little small but very comfortable, clean and bed was comfy. Staff were very accomodating
Stayed 1 night on a powered site.  Very tight & site needed mowing & bits of rubbish not cleaned up.  For $49.50 for a grass site, very disappointed.  Wouldn’t stay again.

Location was OK, the facilities were OK, however the spacing and positioning of all was a little all over the place ! I had a ground flea jump on me, midgies were bad afternoon to early mornings.
I didn't feel a nice or wow feeling on arrival instead I was like 'Umm OK'  ??

Lovely holiday park located on Shute harbour road Airlie Beach. Facilitirsbare great and caravan sites have cement slabs. Great kids area with playground  jumping pillow and water park with pool. Will stay again .

Traveller's beware.
We had a queen bed. The bed was comfortable with nice bedding. Bathroom was fitted with quality shower and toilet.  BUT
Lousy hot water and water pressure. Arrived to ants over everything on the bench. 1 tiny carton of milk to last 2 people for 2 days. Nearly empty box of tissues. The unit measured 3mts by 3mts where the bed was. There was nothing to sit on inside except the bed. We even tried bringing the plastic chairs in from the teeny tiny verandah but they wouldnt fit. When you are in your 70s you just want somewhere to sit and relax, not perched on a bed. 2 tiny bedside tables that would NOT sit level and were all rickety. The only way to stop them wobbling was to lean them against the wall. These rooms maybe new but leave a lot to be desired. If you can fit on the verandah you are looking at the dumpsters or piles of building leftovers. Thank goodness it was dry as we were parked on the dirt from where the building had taken place. As G'day members we have spent time in lots of parks but we will never return to this one. It's a pity that instead of trying to push yet more units into the park you don't concentrate on quality over quantity. By the way this was the unit recommended to us by your staff so you can't cover this up by saying we booked it online and should have chosen something else. You probably will not take any notice of what i am saying as you have shown in earlier review responses but traveller beware don't be fooled by professional photos of the units.

What a beautiful Park with everything my family of 5 needs to have an amazing stay in this stunning part of Australia -  jumping pillow, waterpark, basketball hoop, outdoor movies, bird feeding, synthetic pitch with soccer goals, cricket lanes and games room. Very close to city centre and tour  buses can pick up and drop off. Cabins were immaculate with our deluxe one having a very busy washing machine. Thanks to the amazingly friendly team for a wonderful memory making holiday x

Although the sites are large you still have to be able to get on them. When you book a large site because you have a large van then you expect it to be suitable. Our site here was made for a 19' van and ours is around 23'. Hubby is a ex truck driver who can reverse very well but only with a lot of manoeuvring we managed, because the van across was not there. Our door is in the bushes and our so called cement slab is only useful to sit on. Our poor neighbours at the rear thought we might end up on their doorstep. Would recommend anyone to check the site assigned first before paying. I believe ALL caravan park staff should do a caravan reversing course and see what fits where in their parks." Not Happy Jan"!!!

Stayed here for 6 days, would have stayed longer if sites were available, very busy.  Had a large site, amenities clean, friendly staff, nice pool.. not far to drive into town.  Would recommend a stay here. 👍🏼😊

Stayed here in an unpowered site as we  didn't book in advance and this was all they had but it was fine and fit our 22ft caravan. It didn't have water but there was a tap on the other side of the park that we could fill up at.
The plots for vans/tents are quite small, many people park in front of their van, those on corners park on the corners which make it quite difficult to get your van in and out and the streets are quite narrow. They have multiple camp kitchens which are well equipped. Kids play area is good, as is the swimming pool and water park. We had 2 issues - the midges (which can't be helped) and the fact the park only has one amenities block which was at the other end of the park  and as plots are jam packed there is no way to walk through so you have to walk right around to get to them. Staff were friendly and helpful.
Clean and easy way to stay in airlie beach! Good price!
Lovely garden atmosphere and pool. Bed against the wall was hard to negotiate in small, standard room but had everything you needed including a small deck. Cabins looked very good.

Stayed in a standard cabin, and it was sufficient for our one night stay. I was surprised that there was virtually no noise from the adjoining cabins and certainly no road noise. The room was clean and well presented, with the usual complimentary toiletries and coffee, etc. Arriving late and leaving early wasn't a problem. The grounds looked nice, so hopefully, one day, we will be back for a longer stay.
Super nettes Personal, Klasse Wasserspielplatz und Pool für Kinder. Super Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.
